title: Shapes and Geometry
subject: Mathematics
description: Learn about 2D and 3D shapes, their properties, and patterns
nscObjectives: Identify and name 2D shapes (circle, square, rectangle, triangle, oval, diamond)
Identify and name 3D shapes (cube, sphere, cylinder, cone, rectangular prism)
Describe shapes by their properties (sides, corners, faces)

sections.name: 2D Shapes
sections.instruction: 2D shapes are flat shapes. They have length and width but no depth.

questions.prompt: How many circles can you count?
questions.hint: Look for the round shapes!

questions.prompt: How many triangles do you see?
questions.hint: Triangles have 3 sides and 3 corners.

questions.prompt: How many sides does a square have?
questions.hint: Count each side of a square.

questions.prompt: How many corners does a triangle have?
questions.hint: A triangle has 3 sides and 3 corners.

questions.prompt: Which shape has NO corners?
questions.hint: This shape is perfectly round.

questions.prompt: A rectangle has 4 sides. How many corners does it have?
questions.hint: Each corner is where two sides meet.

sections.name: Shape Properties
sections.instruction: Shapes have different properties like sides, corners, and whether they are curved or straight.

questions.prompt: Which shape has all sides the same length?
questions.hint: A square has 4 equal sides.

questions.prompt: Which shape has 2 long sides and 2 short sides?
questions.hint: Think of a door or a book.

questions.prompt: Select ALL shapes that have 4 sides:
questions.hint: Count the sides of each shape.

questions.prompt: Select ALL shapes that have curved edges:
questions.hint: Curved means round, not straight.

questions.prompt: A diamond shape is also called a:
questions.hint: It looks like a square turned on its side.

sections.name: 3D Shapes
sections.instruction: 3D shapes are solid shapes. They have length, width, AND depth. You can hold them!

questions.prompt: A ball is shaped like a:
questions.hint: A sphere is perfectly round like a ball.

questions.prompt: A dice (die) is shaped like a:
questions.hint: A cube has 6 square faces.

questions.prompt: A can of soup is shaped like a:
questions.hint: A cylinder has 2 circular faces and a curved surface.

questions.prompt: An ice cream cone is shaped like a:
questions.hint: A cone has a circular base and comes to a point.

questions.prompt: How many faces does a cube have?
questions.hint: Think of a dice - count all the sides.

questions.prompt: Match each object to its shape:
questions.hint: Think about what each object looks like.

sections.name: Shapes Around Us
sections.instruction: Shapes are everywhere! Let's find shapes in everyday objects.

questions.prompt: A clock face is usually shaped like a:
questions.hint: Most clocks are round.

questions.prompt: A door is usually shaped like a:
questions.hint: A door is taller than it is wide.

questions.prompt: A yield sign on the road is shaped like a:
questions.hint: Yield signs have 3 sides.

questions.prompt: A pizza slice is shaped like a:
questions.hint: When you cut a pizza, each slice has 3 sides.

questions.prompt: Select ALL objects that are shaped like a rectangle:
questions.hint: Rectangles have 4 sides with 2 long and 2 short.

sections.name: Shape Patterns
sections.instruction: A pattern repeats. Look carefully to find what comes next!

questions.prompt: What comes next? ⭕ ⬜ ⭕ ⬜ ⭕ ___
questions.hint: The pattern is: circle, square, circle, square...

questions.prompt: What comes next? 🔺 🔺 ⭕ 🔺 🔺 ⭕ 🔺 🔺 ___
questions.hint: The pattern is: triangle, triangle, circle...

questions.prompt: What comes next? ⬜ 🔺 ⭕ ⬜ 🔺 ⭕ ⬜ ___
questions.hint: The pattern is: square, triangle, circle...

questions.prompt: What is MISSING? ⭕ ⬜ ⬜ ⭕ ___ ⬜ ⭕ ⬜ ⬜
questions.hint: Look at the pattern: circle, square, square...

questions.prompt: Which shapes are in this pattern? 🔺 ⭕ 🔺 ⭕ 🔺 ⭕
questions.hint: Look at all the shapes in the pattern.
